title: Tales Of Zestiria Features Evangelion Costumes
display_title: Tales Of Zestiria Features Evangelion Costumes
wikitext:
[]: Tales of Zestiria tie-in             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Sep 21, 2014 8:06 am http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2014-09-21/tales-of-zestiria-anime-special-to-air-on-december-30/.79017 Will be able to download costumes from what the article says is FINAL(3.0 + 1.0). Dear god, as a fan of both Eva and Tales, let this dlc come to North America as well... and let there be a Sakura costume too.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Sep 21, 2014 8:29 am ^So they aren't releasing a 3.0+1.0 trailer (yet), but they are releasing outfits from the movie for Zestiria players? Well...I'm not sure how much we'll be able to tell about 3.0+1.0 from what everyone's wearing.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Sep 21, 2014 9:22 am animenewsnetwork took the leap of saying it's related to Final when all Japan has said is that it's related to ENT. The game is doing ヱヴァンゲリヲン新劇場版 Not シン・エヴァンゲリオン劇場版 http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3284.html I will bet money there will be absolutely nothing Final-related with this.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Sep 21, 2014 9:29 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: animenewsnetwork took the leap of saying it's related to Final when all Japan has said is that it's related to ENT. The game is doing ヱヴァンゲリヲン新劇場版 Not シン・エヴァンゲリオン劇場版 http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3284.html I will bet money there will be absolutely nothing Final-related with this.

[]:             Quote Post by Jäeger » Sun Sep 21, 2014 9:53 am OMG, main love interest of the game wears "x" costume Shippers behold!!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Sep 21, 2014 10:13 am Ololololo Even though I'm being ravaged by flu, someone was wrong on the internet so I resurrected my old ass ANN forums account to complain and they fixed it. Time to go extract fluids from my nose again.

[]: Re: Tales of Zestiria tie-in             Quote Post by Jimbob » Sun Sep 21, 2014 12:29 pm hui43210 wrote: let this dlc come to North America as well.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Sep 21, 2014 12:54 pm Pic http://gematsu.com/2014/09/tales-zestiria-gets-evangelion-costume-dlc

[]:             Quote Post by Stan » Mon Sep 22, 2014 9:32 pm I bet 99% of the people wont appreciate this and complain about choosing such a bad crossover series

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Sep 23, 2014 3:11 am Stan wrote: I bet 99% of the people wont appreciate this and complain about choosing such a bad crossover series

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Sep 23, 2014 7:16 am ElMariachi wrote: And poor Asuka is again locked with the Eva Manned Activation Experiment Test Subject Multipurpose Biosensor Equipped Plug Suit!

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Oct 09, 2015 5:48 pm Bumping this thread because the North American version, coming out on Oct 19th, does appear to have the Eva costumes as dlc! https://twitter.com/RPGSite/status/652456415022309376

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Oct 09, 2015 8:23 pm Cool news!

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Tue Nov 10, 2015 4:40 am Quick bump for this but for anyone who has the game the Evangelion Costumes are now available to purchase, at least they are in the UK. I just got them, probably won't have a chance to take a proper look tonight because "lol Fallout 4" but I'll have a quick check as I am really enjoying what I've played of Zestiria so far :) https://store.playstation.com/#!/en-gb/games/addons/tales-of-zestiria-evangelion-costume-set/cid=EP0700-CUSA02461_00-TOZ000000EVACSTM

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Tue Nov 10, 2015 10:37 am I have no such interest in Fallout, so I'll be all over this today, although I'm probably going to wait till new game plus to use them. So far I'm liking this game more than the Xillia games, it's just a simple/fun/silly JRPG, and I love it.
